title: Hardcore Lobsters
description:
This is a modpack made for the Lobsters friend group.
For more information, contact imjustsofa on Discord!
body:
Small Vanilla+ Modpack with QoL features, aimed to provide fun and simple changes to Minecraft.

This modpack is designed to be used by the Lobsters friend group, but can also be used in other instances.

It contains various QoL mods (Jade, Appleskin, etc.) , such as performance mods (Sodium and more), visual changes (Iris for shaders, some new textures for a datapack used on a server for the modpack) and more!
